name: SCC_GetEVSENotification
title: SCC_GetEVSENotification
syntax: void SCC_GetEVSENotification ( char EVSENotification, long& NotificationMaxDelay )
description: Returns the EVSENotification and its maximum delay, if present, from the EVSE status.
return: EVSENotification and its maximum delay, if present, from DC_EVSEStatus
